She and her baby stayed for six days.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      A basement in Springfield where a family found safe haven as the danger of deportation loomed.

A mother thanked her American host. After Haiti’s president was killed in 2021, the Biden administration expanded protected status for Haitians. The Trump administration has sought to remove it.
